title: Create hermes-production namespace with ConfigMap and Secret patterns
subtasks: Create the 'hermes-production' namespace with labels: app.kubernetes.io/part-of=hermes, environment=production.
Replicate the 'hermes-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap from dev/staging, updating all endpoints to production service names.
Create production Secret objects for PostgreSQL, Redis, NATS, and MinIO credentials (with placeholder values for rotation).
Ensure all resources are namespaced to 'hermes-production'.
Apply resource quotas to the namespace to prevent resource exhaustion.

title: Configure CloudNative-PG HA cluster with 3 replicas and synchronous replication
subtasks: Create a production CNPG Cluster CR in 'hermes-production' with 3 instances (1 primary, 2 replicas).
Set synchronous replication: postgresql.synchronous.method=any, postgresql.synchronous.number=1.
Enable automated failover (default in CNPG).
Configure scheduled base backups to MinIO and continuous WAL archiving.
Set resource requests/limits: requests: 1 CPU/2Gi, limits: 2 CPU/4Gi per replica.
Create a PodDisruptionBudget: maxUnavailable: 1.
Configure PVC size (e.g., 50Gi) with production StorageClass.

title: Configure Redis HA with Sentinel mode and 3 replicas
subtasks: Create Redis CR in 'hermes-production' with Sentinel mode enabled and 3 replicas.
Set resource requests/limits: requests: 250m CPU/256Mi, limits: 500m CPU/512Mi per replica.
Configure 3 Sentinel pods for quorum-based failover.
Create a PodDisruptionBudget: maxUnavailable: 1 for Redis pods.
Enable persistence (AOF or RDB) for durability.
Update 'hermes-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap if Redis service name differs in production.

title: Configure NATS HA with 3-node JetStream cluster
subtasks: Create NATS CR in 'hermes-production' with spec.size: 3 for a 3-node cluster.
Enable JetStream with file-based storage and replication factor 3.
Set resource requests/limits: requests: 250m CPU/256Mi, limits: 500m CPU/512Mi per node.
Create a PodDisruptionBudget: maxUnavailable: 1 for NATS pods.
Update 'hermes-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap with NATS production service URL.

title: Harden MinIO for production with versioning and lifecycle policies
subtasks: Determine MinIO deployment model: dedicated tenant (scale to 4+ nodes with erasure coding) or shared instance with production bucket.
Enable bucket versioning on the 'hermes-production' bucket via MinIO client.
Create a 365-day lifecycle retention policy for all objects.
Set resource requests/limits for MinIO pods if using dedicated tenant.
Verify MinIO endpoint in 'hermes-infra-endpoints' ConfigMap points to production MinIO service.

title: Configure TLS termination with cert-manager and HTTPS enforcement
subtasks: If cert-manager is available, create ClusterIssuer/Issuer for Let's Encrypt (staging then production).
Create Certificate CR for 'hermes.{domain}' and 'hermes-api.{domain}' (or wildcard).
If cert-manager is not available, create TLS Secret from pre-provisioned cert/key.
Configure ingress controller to enforce HTTPS redirect (e.g., nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-redirect: 'true').
Set minimum TLS version to 1.2 (e.g., nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/ssl-protocols: 'TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3').
Store TLS config references (secret name, issuer) for Ingress.

title: Create Ingress resources with routing rules, rate limiting, and CORS
subtasks: Create Ingress for Next.js frontend: host 'hermes.{domain}', path '/' → frontend Service.
Create Ingress for Bun/Elysia backend: either 'hermes-api.{domain}' (subdomain) or 'hermes.{domain}/api/*' (path-based) → backend Service.
Reference TLS secret from previous subtask in spec.tls.
Add rate limiting annotations (e.g., nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/limit-rps: '50', limit-connections: '20').
Add CORS annotations for frontend-to-API communication.
Set proxy buffer sizes and timeouts for API endpoints.

title: Apply Kubernetes NetworkPolicy resources for pod-to-pod isolation
subtasks: Create default-deny NetworkPolicy for 'hermes-production' namespace.
Allow ingress to frontend pods from ingress controller; egress only to backend on port 3001.
Allow backend pods ingress from ingress controller and frontend; egress to PostgreSQL, Redis, NATS, MinIO, Loki.
Allow backend egress to external HTTPS for screenshot capture (port 443 to 0.0.0.0/0 or restricted CIDR).
Allow DNS egress (port 53 to kube-dns).
Restrict data service pods to ingress only from backend pods.
Deny all inter-namespace traffic except kube-system (DNS).
Label pods for NetworkPolicy selectors.

title: Configure HorizontalPodAutoscalers for backend and frontend services
subtasks: Update backend Deployment with resource requests/limits: requests: 500m CPU/512Mi, limits: 1 CPU/1Gi.
Create HPA for backend: minReplicas: 2, maxReplicas: 10, targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 70.
Update frontend Deployment with resource requests/limits: requests: 250m CPU/256Mi, limits: 500m CPU/512Mi.
Create HPA for frontend: minReplicas: 2, maxReplicas: 5, targetCPUUtilizationPercentage: 70.
Verify metrics-server is available in the cluster.
Set scale-down stabilization window (default 300s).

title: Create PodDisruptionBudgets for all application services
subtasks: Create PDB for backend: minAvailable: 1, selector matching backend pod labels.
Create PDB for frontend: minAvailable: 1, selector matching frontend pod labels.
Verify PDBs do not conflict with HPA minReplicas.
Ensure PDBs for data services are present (from previous subtasks).

title: Create Helm values-production.yaml overlay for all production configurations
subtasks: Create 'charts/hermes-infra/values-production.yaml' with all production-specific overrides.
Structure values by component: postgresql.replicas, redis.sentinel.enabled, nats.cluster.size, minio.versioning, etc.
Include TLS, ingress, network policy, HPA, and PDB configurations.
Update Helm templates to conditionally render production resources based on values.
Verify 'helm template' with values-production.yaml renders all expected resources.
Run 'helm lint' and a dry-run install to confirm correctness.
Document the production deployment command.
